name: RDM Manager
description: Sovereign (POPIA-resident) research-data-management module: dataset deposit, AI-assisted human-gated POPIA sensitivity scan, access/embargo + DOI, compliance dashboard. Reverse port of Heratio ahg-rdm (heratio#1337).
author: The Archive and Heritage Group (Pty) Ltd
features: Dataset wrapper over a container information_object
Per-file deposit as child IO + master digital_object (no bespoke storage)
POPIA sensitivity scan (deterministic + lexicon + gateway NER) [later phases]
Human-gated review of scan findings [later phases]
Access/embargo (ODRL) + DataCite DOI + public landing [later phases]

changelog.0.1.0: Phase 1 (#168): scaffold + Dataset model + deposit via AtoM IngestService
